sections.paragraph:
- Original: Σαμαρείτης

- Transliteration: Samareites

- Phonetic: sam-ar-i'-tace

- Definition:

1. a Samaritan,

a. an inhabitant of the city of Samaria

b. an inhabitant of the region of Samaria

- Origin: from G4540

- TDNT entry: 08:29,0

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G4540; a Samarite that is inhabitants of Samaria: - Samaritan.
